  "findings": [
    "Unprotected trench depth of 5 feet or greater with workers actively inside",
    "Lack of cave-in protection system (sloping, shoring, or shielding)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Evacuate all workers from the trench immediately",
    "Stop all work inside the trench until protective systems are installed",
    "Install compliant cave-in protection (trench box, shoring, or proper sloping/benching) per OSHA standards",
    "Ensure a competent person inspects the trench and protective systems before workers re-enter"
  ],
  "rationale": "An unprotected trench 5 feet or deeper with workers inside represents an immediate cave-in hazard and a critical safety violation under OSHA regulations. Work must be halted immediately to prevent catastrophic injury or death.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart P",
    "OSHA 1926.652(a)(1)"
  ]
}
